In the name of Allah, the Merciful, the CompassionateFootnote-1
PraiseFootnote-2 be to Allah, the LordFootnote-3 of the entire universe.
The Master of the Day of RecompenseFootnote-5.
You alone do we worshipFootnote-6, and You alone do we turn for helpFootnote-7
Direct us on to the Straight WayFootnote-8,
The way of those whom You have favouredFootnote-9, who did not incur Your wrath, who are not astrayFootnote-10.
